steps: Contact Goldman Sachs to request return of USD 2,025.00 overpayment on GOOGL dividends for account 1901234567
Provide documentation showing US-UK treaty rate of 15% should apply, not the 13.5% rate actually withheld
Reference IRS tax treaty tables and UK treaty documents to support the correct withholding calculation
If Goldman Sachs disputes, escalate with formal claim citing treaty violation and request immediate refund
